title: String literals should not be duplicated
description: String literals should not be duplicatedAnalyze your codeadaptability-distinctmaintainabilityCode SmelldesignWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?Duplicated string literals make the process of refactoring complex and error-prone, as any change would need to be propagated on all occurrences.ExceptionsThe following are ignored:literals with fewer than 5 charactersliterals matching one of the parameter namesliterals used in attributesAvailable In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: String literal is duplicated multiple times - consider extracting to a constant

never_trigger_on: String literals with fewer than 5 characters
logic.reasoning: Duplicated string literals make refactoring complex and error-prone since any change needs to be propagated on all occurrences. Extracting to a constant improves maintainability.

should_not_trigger:
const string Message = "This is a duplicated string";
Console.WriteLine(Message);
